calendar.description: House Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses requirements to operate or launch a vessel related to aquatic invasive species.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms, including defining "invasive mussel";<hr><ltbullet>exempts an owner or operator of certain vessels from requirements related to invasive species and launching or operating the vessel on waters of the state;<hr><ltbullet>addresses vessels owned by government agencies;<hr><ltbullet>amends provisions related to a required aquatic invasive species education course;<hr><ltbullet>addresses vessels rented or leased from a boat livery, including modifying recordkeeping requirements for a boat livery;<hr><ltbullet>modifies provisions related to collection of annual aquatic invasive species fees, including repealing outdated language;<hr><ltbullet>addresses responsibilities of the Division of Law Enforcement and the Division of Wildlife Resources; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming amendments.
